questions.prompt: I'd like to ask you some questions about your experiences with commuting. First, what kinds of places do you usually go to during the week and how do you get there?
Got it. Can you describe how someone in your family or a friend usually travels to work or school?
How much time does it take and what transportation does the person use?
Some people believe that living close to work or school improves quality of life. While others think location doesn't matter much, what do you think?
